rate_limit: 5 req/sec target; ORCID anonymous public API 6 req/sec cap
run_status: PARTIAL — stopped via SIGINT at 33% completion; full run takes ~4 hours; next agent run can resume (orcid_last_fetched window filter skips already-queried)
data_quality_caveat: profile JSON column has full /person response (incl. external-identifiers as plain strings) but extractExternalIds is buggy (looks for {value:...} format). /person does not include employments/educations — those require separate /employments endpoint (NOT queried).
